purpose: This project exemplifies high-quality enterprise software through a customizable version of the FizzBuzz game, demonstrating architectural principles.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Provides an overview of the project, its purpose, and contribution guidelines.

purpose: Contains test files and main interfaces for the FizzBuzz application.

key_files.name: FizzBuzzTest.java
key_files.role: Contains unit tests for the FizzBuzz logic.

key_files.name: TestConstants.java
key_files.role: Holds constants used in FizzBuzz tests.

key_files.name: FizzBuzz.java
key_files.role: Defines the FizzBuzz interface for implementations.

key_files.name: OutputGenerationContext.java
key_files.role: Defines strategy context for output generation.

key_files.name: OutputGenerationContextVisitor.java
key_files.role: Defines a visitor for output generation contexts.

concerns: Tests are only for FizzBuzz and do not cover other modules.
No assertion checks on the output of all FizzBuzz calls.
Missing unit tests for the interfaces.
No documentation comments for methods in OutputGenerationContext and OutputGenerationContextVisitor.
Test constants could be better organized or grouped.

purpose: Contains files related to configuring the Gradle wrapper for this project.

key_files.name: gradle-wrapper.properties
key_files.role: Configuration file for the Gradle wrapper specifying distribution URL and store paths.

purpose: Spring configuration file for component scanning in the FizzBuzz application.
